title: Expenditures for Sponsored Award-Related Goods and Services Policy
display_label: Expenditures for Sponsored Award-Related Goods and Services
content: Governs how goods and services charged to sponsored awards are procured, authorized, documented, and reviewed for allowability, allocability, and reasonableness under sponsor terms and federal cost principles. Applies to purchases, subcontracts, consulting, and other award-related expenditures. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
